mapper.select: SELECT notice_id, admin_id, category, title, content, image_url, view_count, is_top, created_at, updated_at FROM NOTICE WHERE notice_id = #{noticeId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO NOTICE(notice_id, admin_id, category, title, content, image_url, is_top, view_count, created_at, updated_at) VALUES(SEQ_NOTICE.NEXTVAL, #{admin_id}, #{category}, #{title}, #{content}, #{image_url}, #{is_top}, 0, SYSTIMESTAMP, SYSTIMESTAMP)
mapper.update: UPDATE NOTICE SET category = #{category}, title = #{title}, content = #{content}, image_url = #{image_url}, is_top = #{is_top}, updated_at = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE notice_id = #{noticeId}
